name: Yin-Yang Raspberry and Mandarin Orange Tart
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugar, butter, and almond paste in a food processor until smooth.
2. Add 1 egg to the mixture and process to combine.
3. Add the second egg and continue processing until smooth.
4. Incorporate Mandarin orange liqueur and orange flower water, then process to blend.
5. Pour the mixture into the partially baked shell.
6. Bake for 25 - 30 minutes in a preheated 350°F oven until the top is evenly browned and puffed.
7. Remove the tart from the oven and let it cool on a rack.
8. Arrange raspberries and Mandarin orange segments in a yin-yang pattern on top of the cooled filling.
9. Brush the warm glaze (passion fruit jam, melted) thinly but evenly over the fruit and along the edge of the tart shell.
10. Remove the rim of the tart pan before serving by centering the tart on your hand or a can.
